description: A square designed graphic in ICE's recurring 'THE WORST FIRST' template. The background is the standard desaturated, high-contrast black-and-white close-up of handcuffed human hands against a dark torso, used as a generic stand-in rather than the subject's photo. A red diagonal corner banner reads 'NEW ENGLAND' in white serif caps. The top-left headline is light cyan bold sans-serif 'ARRESTED AND PENDING REMOVAL,' with white sub-line '2/5/2025 | Manchester, NH.' The arrestee's name is large white bold sans-serif: 'Ronald Jose Reyes Ollarvides.' Below, a 'CRIME:' label lists bulleted entries 'Known TdA gang member,' 'Robbery,' and 'Larceny.' The DHS seal and white 'ICE' wordmark sit at bottom left; a red '-THE- WORST FIRST' box at bottom right. The fixed template pairs an anonymized handcuffs stock image with a named individual and gang/theft allegations as a propaganda device to depict immigration detainees as dangerous criminals and justify removals. The tweet links to ICE newsroom resources. Target audience: the general public and supporters of immigration enforcement.
notable_text: ARRESTED AND PENDING REMOVAL; 2/5/2025 | Manchester, NH; Ronald Jose Reyes Ollarvides; CRIME: Known TdA gang member, Robbery, Larceny; NEW ENGLAND; -THE- WORST FIRST; ICE
